items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #5' requires deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding 'Extension state isolation between businesses'. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality has been implemented or tested. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any relevant evidence to support the expected outcome, leading to an inconclusive status.
